name: BrightSpire Capital, Inc.
business: BrightSpire Capital, Inc. is an internally-managed commercial real estate (CRE) credit real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on originating, acquiring, financing and managing a diversified portfolio consisting primarily of CRE debt investments and net leased properties. CRE debt investments primarily consist of senior mortgage loans, which is the company's primary investment strategy. The company also selectively originates mezzanine loans and preferred equity investments, and invests in net leased properties.

exposures.sentence: One multifamily that was resolved in the first quarter of 2026 when the property was acquired through a foreclosure and reclassified to real estate; One multifamily loan and one industrial loan that were both resolved in the first quarter of 2026 following repayment; Two multifamily loans that are expected to repay in the first half of 2026, as the underlying collateral is under an executed purchase and sale agreement for one loan and a letter of intent for one loan.

The market for office properties was particularly negatively impacted by the COVID-19 pandemic and continues to experience headwinds driven by the normalization of work from home and hybrid work arrangements and elevated costs to operate or reconfigure office properties.
One multifamily loan and one industrial loan that were both resolved in the first quarter of 2026 following repayment.

Shifts in consumer patterns, market disruption caused by artificial intelligence, automation and logistics, and continuing variability in work from home policies influenced by advances in communication and information technology that affect the use of traditional retail, hotel and office space may have an adverse impact on the value of certain of our debt and equity investments.

catalysts.sentence: On February 17, 2026, we closed a $955.0 million CLO transaction, BRSP 2026-FL3.

catalysts.event: Expect to redeem BRSP 2021-FL1 in February 2026
catalysts.sentence: We also expect to redeem BRSP 2021-FL1 in February 2026 as part of the transaction.

catalysts.event: Executed purchase and sale agreement to sell one office property expected to close in Q1 2026
catalysts.sentence: Executed a purchase and sale agreement to sell one office property that is expected to close in the first quarter of 2026 and expected to generate gross proceeds of approximately $28.0 million.
